developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, this content is suitable for children or some who hope to known VR space knowledge, astral phenomenon. we will continue to update the content and graphics.

reviews.review_description:
Not bad, but the planets look so tiny they look like marbles right in front of your eyes and everything looks so shrunk around you, I'm sorry but i had to uninstall it, i would love to take a  full journey through out the solar system exploring our planets while everything is huge and zooming in to take a closer look on each planet's details just like Titans of space for example, that would be so exciting even if the game content is up to 1 gb it doesn't matter,
I'm sorry about my comment but hopefully you might learn something from it.

I quite enjoyed this app

some of the animations were well done like the asteroid belt for example


The only negative is the moments section. Those animations leave something to be desired.
